title: AVR Lock and Fuse bits
description: AVR Lock and Fuse bits documents lock and fuse bits material for AVR in the hardware domain. It is classified as an operation page for the mcu-family class, so readers can understand its topic, scope, and place in the wiki taxonomy. The page highlights Lock bits, Fuse bits, Extended Fuse bits, Fuse High bits, and Fuse Low bits, with examples, commands, diagrams, or references kept close to the relevant explanation. Important search terms include lock bit, fuse bit, avr lock and fuse bits, lock-and-fuse-bits, and hardware, helping both humans and generated indexes connect this page with adjacent concepts.
